title: Nakula Lyrics Vallinam Songs Lyrics

Movie: Vallinam
Music: S. Thaman

Lyrics in Thanglish

valai virithudu ..

Iravum pagalaa, thuzhiyum kadalaa
manal manalaa manalaa punalaa
uyira udalaa asalaa nagalaa
yenil edhu nee nakulaa

Sevilin sedhilaa adhilum adhilaa
medhu medhuvaa adikkum puyalaa

Kaipidi alavaa, kaikulle aadava
eppadi marupen enakkenna adamaa
un idai valamaa en viral balamaa
nenjukul kodhithaal adhan peyar juramaa

Kangalai vidavaa kal enna valuvaa

Ullangai thodavaa un mattam nadavaa
un mutham padhindhaal adhai padhainidava

valai virithudu ila manam irai

Idhu varai pandhaadum ennam
dhaayam pola uruttiya pinnum .palamurai
aadi aadi naanum aatam palagidanum
oru sol podhume ennai mudukkaa
pathu pakkam thandhaal edhai padikkaa
innum innum vali irukka?? uyir edukkaa

ven andhi niramaa, veyilin gunamaa
un mudi parakkum tharikketta thanamaa

neenthida varuma, thathalikanumaa
un vizhi kulathil karai pidipadumaa

theekuchi thirala, muttidum thanalaa
un mugam jolikkum thaga thaga porulaa
konjam nee agala maaridu nakulaa
ippadi virattum kapadikku padhilaa English Translation

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nakula?

The song Nakula conveys themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the context of Nakula in the movie Vallinam?

In Vallinam, Nakula is featured during a lively sequence that showcases the characters' camaraderie and zest for life.

Who are the singers of Nakula?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah and Nakul, whose voices blend beautifully to create an energetic vibe.

Who composed the music for Nakula?

The music for Nakula was composed by Thaman S, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was Nakula released?

Nakula was released on February 23, 2014, as part of the Vallinam soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Nakula from Vallinam is a lively duet that encapsulates the exuberance of youth and friendship. It features a catchy melody and vibrant lyrics that evoke feelings of joy and celebration. The energetic performances by Andrea Jeremiah and Nakul, combined with Thaman S's dynamic composition, make it a perfect anthem for parties. Overall, the song conveys a sense of freedom and happiness, inviting listeners to dance and enjoy life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nakula from the movie Vallinam is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful energy and celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Andrea Jeremiah and Nakul, paired with Thaman S's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the joy and rhythm that makes Nakula a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: The waves are falling down, the net is spread wide. This is not a simple heart; it reveals the truth in the middle of the land.
Day and night, the waves and the sand, life is like a dance. What are you, Nakula?
In the midst of the fun, there is seriousness. It can hit hard, but it’s also playful. Whatever it is, Nakula, it’s the beginning of everything.
Is it a grip of the hand? How do I change? What does it mean to me? If my heart is angry, it gets a name.
Will you let go of your eyes? What will be the value of my words? I will give answers in dreams.
Will you touch my heart? Will your kiss be sweet? If I touch it, will it be sweet?
The waves are falling down, the net is spread wide. This is not a simple heart; it reveals the truth in the middle of the land.
Until now, it feels like a burden. After that, I will dance and play. Just one word is enough to stop me. If you give me a look, will there still be pain?
Oh, that beautiful night, like the cool breeze, your hair dances in the wind.
Will you come to me? Will you be playful? Will your eyes catch me?
The sparkles shine, and your face glows. Just a little, you should change, Nakula, and not be so careless.
